name: Mom's Southern Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Unsweetened applesauce or apple butter
2 tbsp Very strong coffee or espresso (prepared, not grounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry and place it in a 9-inch pie pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine fruit sweetener, cornmeal, and applesauce/butter. Beat with an electric mixer.
3. In a small bowl, blend water and cornstarch until smooth. Add to the fruit sweetener mixture and blend.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time. Stir in vanilla and coffee.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
6. Decorate the top with pecan halves.
7. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until the custard is set, at 375 degrees.
8. Cool slightly before cutting. One serving equals: 1 bread, 1 fruit, 2 fat exchanges. 211 cal, 9g fat, 28g carb, 69mg sod, 3g protein, 82mg chol.
This recipe was posted by Sherry Eckert on P - ID#GDDF80A and she got it from SWEET INSPIRATIONS SUGAR FREE DESSERT COOKBOOK.
